user.title: Connect to Schneider Conext Gateway
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Conext Gateway, InsightHome, or InsightFacility device. Default port is 503 for InsightHome/InsightFacility, 502 for ComBox.

devices.title: Add a Device
devices.description: Add a Schneider Conext device connected to your Gateway. Each device requires a device type and its Modbus slave address.

add_another.title: Add Another Device?
add_another.description: You have configured {device_count} device(s). Would you like to add another?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Schneider Gateway. Please check the host and port.
